outputs.description: The unique ID of the account. CyberArkPAS.Accounts.categoryModificationTime The last modified date of the account.
outputs.name: CyberArkPAS.Accounts.id

outputs.description: The date the account was created. CyberArkPAS.Accounts.name The name of the account.
outputs.name: CyberArkPAS.Accounts.createdTime

outputs.description: The platform assigned to this account. CyberArkPAS.Accounts.safeName The safe where the account is created.
outputs.name: CyberArkPAS.Accounts.platformId

outputs.description: Whether the account secret is automatically managed by the CPM. CyberArkPAS.Accounts.secretType The type of password.
outputs.name: CyberArkPAS.Accounts.secretManagement

outputs.description: The name of the account user. CyberArkPAS.Accounts.address The name or address of the machine where the account will be used.
outputs.name: CyberArkPAS.Accounts.userName
